basis.name: Apple App Store screenshot specifications
basis.requirement: Prepare store-accurate PNG/JPG screenshots for required iPhone and iPad display families.

basis.name: Apple App Privacy Details
basis.requirement: Declare app and third-party code data collection practices before submission.

basis.name: Google Play Data safety
basis.requirement: Complete a clear and accurate Data safety section for every app.

basis.name: Google Play account deletion requirements
basis.requirement: Apps with account creation must disclose account deletion support and provide a functional web deletion link.

basis.name: Capacitor documentation
basis.requirement: Use Capacitor as the native container path for iOS and Android packaging.

basis.name: MIIT app filing notice
basis.requirement: Prepare operator, domain, ICP filing, and APP filing materials for China distribution.

milestones.title: Public HTTPS web base
milestones.objective: Choose and deploy the public HTTPS domain used by PWA, support, privacy, terms, AI disclosure, and account deletion pages.
evidence: PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN is set to an HTTPS URL
supportUrl, marketingUrl, privacyPolicyUrl, and accountDeletionUrl no longer use TODO placeholders
All public legal pages load without authentication
nextActions: Select final domain and hosting provider
Deploy dist and public legal pages
Replace TODO public URLs in store/submission-readiness.json

milestones.title: Store contact and support channel
milestones.objective: Provide review-safe support contact details for store listings and user support.
inputs: Support phone or business contact number
evidence: contactEmail is a real monitored email address
contactPhone is filled with a reachable support or business contact
public/support.html mirrors the chosen support channel
nextActions: Create or choose support inbox
Confirm phone/contact policy
Update public support page and store/submission-readiness.json

milestones.title: Privacy labels and data safety forms
milestones.objective: Finalize privacy disclosures for Apple App Privacy and Google Play Data safety based on actual production data flows.
inputs: Whether analytics, ads, or tracking are added
evidence: privacy.applePrivacyNutritionLabel.status is ready
privacy.googleDataSafety.status is ready
Legal pages no longer contain pre-release wording
Third-party SDK review statuses are ok or documented
nextActions: Review server routes and local storage usage
Confirm no analytics/ads SDK is added without disclosure
Finalize privacy.html, ai-disclosure.html, and Data safety answers

milestones.title: Review demo account and notes
milestones.objective: Prepare a stable reviewer path that demonstrates mobile creation, assets/results, settings, legal pages, and account deletion request.
inputs: Review instructions for dry-run video generation
evidence: review.demoAccountStatus is ready
review.reviewNotesStatus is ready
Reviewer can open home, create, assets, stitch, settings, support, and deletion pages without private local paths
nextActions: Create a review-safe account or local auth bypass for review environment
Seed non-private demo product image and generated result
Write App Store and Google Play review notes

milestones.title: Native iOS and Android packaging
milestones.objective: Install Capacitor packages, generate native projects, sync the built web app, and validate device behavior.
blocks: iOS native project is not present
Android native project is not present
inputs: Final app icon and splash assets
evidence: @capacitor/core, @capacitor/cli, @capacitor/ios, and @capacitor/android are installed
ios/App/App/Info.plist exists
android/app/build.gradle exists
Android android:allowBackup is false
Android manifest does not enable cleartext traffic
iOS Info.plist does not declare broad ATS exceptions
capacitor:check warnings for missing native projects are resolved
nextActions: Install Android SDK and configure ANDROID_HOME or ANDROID_SDK_ROOT
Switch Android build environment to JDK 17 or newer
Open Android project and verify Gradle build with the selected JDK/Android SDK
Open iOS project on macOS and verify Xcode signing/build settings
Validate safe areas, file picker, downloads, support links, and account deletion on real devices

milestones.title: Store-accurate screenshots
milestones.objective: Convert current mobile web screenshot coverage into store-accurate native screenshot sets.
evidence: mobile-web-390, mobile-web-430, and tablet-web-768 screenshots exist
iOS App Store required portrait sizes are captured
Google Play phone screenshots are captured
Screenshots do not expose private data or TODO URLs
nextActions: Use current web captures as layout baseline
Capture iOS screenshots after Capacitor iOS validation
Capture Android screenshots after Capacitor Android validation

milestones.title: China distribution compliance
milestones.objective: Prepare domestic Android store and public China distribution materials.
evidence: china.operatorName is the real legal entity
china.icpFilingNumber and china.appFilingNumber are filled
filingDisplayLocation points to an in-app or public page location
Domestic channel privacy and permission materials are prepared
nextActions: Confirm legal entity and domain ownership
Complete ICP and APP filing steps
Add filing display location to support/legal surfaces
